sources.title: I Was a Shoplifter (1950)
sources.description: A police detective uses any means possible to trap a gang of shoplifters. Watch on RetroFlix.org: https://retroflix.org/i-was-a-shoplifter-1950/

sources.title: I Was a Shoplifter (restored, colorized) (1950, film noir, imdb score: 6.1)
sources.description: I Was a Shoplifter is a 1950 American film noir crime film directed by Charles Lamont and starring Scott Brady and Mona Freeman .

sources.title: I Was A Shoplifter 1950 Crime/Noir ★★★ CC: [1:13:46]
sources.description: I Was A Shoplifter is a 1950 American  film noir   crime film  directed by  Charles Lamont  and starring  Scott Brady  and  Mona Freeman . Police detective Sergeant Jeff Andrews is working on a case involving a gang of shoplifters, and he allows himself to be falsely arrested as a petty thief in order to make contact with the gang. Meanwhile, Faye Burton, a petty shoplifter and the daughter of a prominent judge, is blackmailed by the gang into joining them on the promise that they will retrieve a confession signed when she was caught by a department-store detective who had her sign the document rather than calling the police.

metadata.Plot: Police detective sergeant Jeff Andrews is working on a case involving a gang of shoplifters, and he allows himself to falsely arrested as a petty thief, in order to make contact with the gang. Meanwhile, Faye Burton, a petty shoplifter and the daughter of a prominent judge, is blackmailed by the gang into joining them on the promise that they will get back a confession signed when she was caught by a department store detective, who had her sign the document rather than calling the police. It takes Jeff and Faye a lot longer to figure out who is the 'brains' behind the shoplifting gang than it does the audience, and the audience has less information than they do.
metadata.Actors: Scott Brady, Mona Freeman, Andrea King
